title.en: DISPLAYING; ADVERTISING; SIGNS; LABELS OR NAME-PLATES; SEALS
Cardboard or like show-cards of foldable or flexible material
Single substantially flat cards
Folded cards
wholly or partly imitating the form of an object, e.g. of the article to be advertised
Supports or holders for show-cards

Labels, tag tickets, or similar identification or indication means (medals or badges A44C3/00; making labels B31D1/02; sheets temporarily attached together B42F; labelling B65C; labels on record carriers G11B23/38, G11B23/40); Seals; Postage or like stamps
{Identification bracelets, e.g. secured to the arm of a person}
Forms or constructions (layered products B32B)
to be fastened or secured by the material of the label itself, e.g. by thermo-adhesion (by a separate adhesive layer G09F3/10)
Fastening or securing by means not forming part of the material of the label itself
Means for displaying samples (packaging per se B65)
Portable sample cases
Cards of samples; Books of samples (packages comprising articles attached to cards, sheets, or webs for removal therefrom B65D73/00)

Signs, name or number plates, letters, numerals, or symbols (vehicle registration number plates B60R13/10); Panels or boards (show-cards G09F1/00; indicating arrangements for variable information G09F9/00, G09F11/00; illuminated signs G09F13/00; boards for notices or posters G09F15/00)
{weather-proof panels or boards (G09F7/02 - G09F7/14, G09F7/18 - G09F7/22 take precedence)}
{Signs associated with a sensor}
{Signs without covering windows}
Signs, plates, panels or boards using readily-detachable elements bearing or forming symbols
Letters, numerals, or other symbols adapted for permanent fixing to a support
Means for attaching signs, plates, panels, or boards to a supporting structure

Indicating arrangements for variable information in which the information is built-up on a support by selection or combination of individual elements (in which the variable information is permanently attached to a movable support G09F11/00; abacus G06C1/00; slide-rules G06G1/00)

in which the desired character or characters are formed by combining individual elements (panels comprising a number of electrodes in a single cell controlling light arriving from an independent light source, e.g. electro-optical or magneto-optical cell, G02F1/00)
in which the desired character is selected from a number of characters arranged one beside the other, e.g. on a common carrier plate
in which the desired character is selected from a number of characters arranged one behind the other

Indicating arrangements for variable information in which the complete information is permanently attached to a movable support which brings it to the display position (showcases or showcabinets with arrangements for continuously or intermittently moving the merchandise A47F3/08; using static means to present variable information G09F9/00)
{Roller-band displays}
the display elements being secured to rotating members, e.g. drums, spindles
the display elements being carried by endless belts, chains, or the like
the display elements being carried by belts, chains, or the like other than endless
the advertising or display material forming part of rotating members, e.g. in the form of perforations, prints, or transparencies on a drum or disc
the advertising or display material forming part of a moving band, e.g. in the form of perforations, prints, or transparencies
the display elements being fed one by one from storage place to a display position
Illuminated signs; Luminous advertising (G09F9/00, G09F11/00 take precedence; control of displays in general using static means to present variable information G09G)
{Illumination controller or illuminated signs including an illumination control system}
Signs, boards, or panels, illuminated by artificial light sources positioned in front of the insignia
Signs, boards or panels, illuminated from behind the insignia
Signs formed of or incorporating reflecting elements or surfaces, e.g. warning signs having triangular or other geometrical shape
Edge-illuminated signs
with luminescent surfaces or parts (luminescent compositions C09K11/00; light sources using luminescence F21K2/00)
using tubes or the like filled with liquid, e.g. bubbling liquid
Signs formed by electric discharge tubes (by selective lighting G09F9/00)
Signs formed by filament-type lamp (by selective lighting G09F9/00)
with moving light sources, e.g. rotating luminous tubes
with moving optical part of parts, e.g. mirrors

with light sources co-operating with movable members, e.g. with shutters to cover or uncover the light source (apparatus wherein advertising or display material is moved in a continuous or intermittent succession G09F11/00; construction or details of lighting devices F21V11/00)
with light sources activated by non-visible radiation (cathode ray image or pattern display tubes H01J31/10; lamps with luminescent screens excited by cathode rays H01J63/06)
with gas as lighting source
Advertising by fireworks
Boards, hoardings, pillars, or like structures for notices, placards, posters, or the like
{planar structures comprising one or more panels}
{Modular articulated structures, e.g. stands, and articulation means therefor}
{Pillars}
{including movable parts, e.g. movable by the wind}
{Tensioned structures}
Bills, posters, or the like therefor
Flags; Banners; Mountings therefor
{Devices for avoiding twisting of the flag}
{Raising or lowering devices}
{Flag materials}
{Suspended banners}
{Means for mounting flags to masts}
{Stands for flags}
{Flags on vehicles}
{Safety flags}
{Anti-foiling flagpoles; Sliding means to avoid foiling of flags on the poles}
Advertising or display means not otherwise provided for
{Advertising means including image processing to create a special effect when viewed from a camera}
{Scented advertising means}
{Inflatable advertising means}
incorporating moving display members
using special optical effects
Advertising or display means on roads, walls or similar surfaces, e.g. illuminated
Mobile visual advertising (combined visual and audible advertising G09F27/00)
by a carrier person or animal
by land vehicles
by aeroplanes, airships, balloons, or kites
by ships or other floating means
Dispensing devices for pamphlets or similar advertising matter from vehicles (from aircraft B64D1/00)
Advertising on or in specific articles, e.g. ashtrays, letter-boxes (on or in vehicles G09F21/00)
{on parking meters}
{on pens}
{on containers}
{on cigarette lighters}
{on seats}
{on electrical household appliances, e.g. on a dishwasher, a washing machine or a refrigerator}
{on sports articles, e.g. golf clubs}
{on buttons}
{on sanitary articles, e.g. on cakes of soap}
{on petrol dispensers}
{on soda or beer cans}
{on phone-carried indicia}
the advertising matter being displayed by the operation of the article
the advertising matter being combined with articles for restaurants, shops or offices (on paper articles G09F23/10)
on paper articles, e.g. booklets, newspapers
on toys, games, puzzles, or similar devices
on clocks, e.g. controlled by the clock mechanism
Audible advertising (sound recording or reproducing per se G11B; public address systems H04R27/00)
{Message recorded in a memory device}
Combined visual and audible advertising or displaying, e.g. for public address
{Comprising a presence or proximity detector}
{Advertising message recorded in a memory device}
{Displays including an emergency or alarm message}
{Signs associated with a sensor}
{Displays with power supply provided by solar cells or photocells}
{Sun shades, shades, hoods or louvres on electronic displays to minimise the effect of direct sun light on the display}
{Retrofitted static panels to make them dynamic}
